decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: transfer moves amount from src to dst on success; and if src has insufficient funds it raises InsufficientFunds and leaves BOTH balances unchanged — no partial debit or credit.
The change modifies only the ledger module and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It confirms the source has sufficient funds BEFORE mutating any balance, so a failed transfer cannot leave partial state (e.g. it withdraws from src before crediting dst, or checks first).
It goes through the existing withdraw/deposit methods (or their validation) rather than mutating _balances directly and bypassing the insufficient-funds and positive-amount checks.
